title: Slovakian Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian-inspired stir-fry with a variety of vegetables and a crispy topping.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Slovakian sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots, bell peppers, and onions to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Pour in the fry sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Sprinkle the crispy fried onions on top of the stir-fry.
